# Neural Cosmology

> Public HQ for the Neural Cosmology research programme by Mikhail Savchenko:
> three books, one preprint (Pointer Architecture), a growing body of essays,
> and recorded lectures. Scientist with questions, not prophet with answers.
> All content is public and citable; the preprint ships with a full
> reproducibility pipeline (code, data, fit diagnostics).

Author: Mikhail Savchenko — independent researcher and writer.
Contact: info@neuralcosmology.com
Canonical site: https://neuralcosmology.com (en, ru, pt, es)
Same-as: https://t.me/neuralcosmology, https://github.com/neuralcosmology

## Core research

- [Pointer Architecture — constrained information-geometric model of galactic rotation curves](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/science/pointer-architecture): Preprint v2. Head-to-head comparison of three models on 171 SPARC galaxies. Constrained Pointer wins AIC on 60/171; partial correlation on halo extent ρ = +0.19, q_FDR = 0.04. Full reproducibility pipeline released.
- [PDF — Pointer Architecture v2](https://neuralcosmology.com/pdfs/pointer-architecture-v2.pdf): The full preprint.
- [Code — pointer-architecture](https://github.com/neuralcosmology/pointer-architecture): Fit code, data loaders, diagnostics.
- [Science index](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/science): Landing page for all research outputs.

## Books

- [The Celestial Code](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/books/celestial-code): Non-fiction. The argument behind the programme, written in plain language. Target spring 2027, 5.5/8 author sheets complete.
- [Bugs Academy](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/books/bugs-academy): Sci-fi novel. A debugger saves the universe. Complete, 231 pp, seeking publisher.
- [Era of Architects](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/books/era-of-architects): Literary sci-fi sequel to Bugs Academy. In progress, 3 of 17 chapters.
- [Books index](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/books): All three volumes side by side.

## Essays

- [Essays index](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/essays): Long-form writing where the physics meets the prose. One idea, fully argued, per essay.

## Lectures

- [Lectures index](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/lectures): Recorded talks and walk-throughs of the programme.

## About

- [About — Mikhail Savchenko](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/about): Short bio, contact, and agent/press links.

## Machine-readable

- [Sitemap](https://neuralcosmology.com/sitemap.xml): Full URL inventory across all four locales.
- [Essays RSS (en)](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/essays/rss.xml): Feed of new essays. Available in ru, pt, es — swap the locale prefix.
- [robots.txt](https://neuralcosmology.com/robots.txt): Crawler policy with explicit AI-bot allow/deny.
- [Pointer Architecture — plain markdown](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/science/pointer-architecture/raw.md): Preprint summary in text/markdown for clean ingest.
- [Essays index (JSON)](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/essays/index.json): Plain-JSON list of all essays with metadata and raw-markdown URLs.
- [Science index (JSON)](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/science/index.json): Plain-JSON list of papers with metadata.
- [Lectures index (JSON)](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/lectures/index.json): Plain-JSON list with video + transcript URLs.
- [Books index (JSON)](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/books/index.json): Plain-JSON list of books across all locales.
- [FAQ (JSON)](https://neuralcosmology.com/en/faq.json): Question–answer pairs for /science and /about sections. Available in en, ru, pt, es.
- Essays are available as plain markdown at `/{locale}/essays/{slug}/raw.md` — same content as the HTML page, without layout chrome.
- Lecture transcripts at `/{locale}/lectures/{slug}/transcript.md` when available. English transcripts are YouTube-sourced (auto-generated or human-made); ru/pt/es are YouTube auto-translations from the English source.

## Citation

If you cite this work, please use:

Savchenko, M. (2026). Pointer Architecture: A Constrained Information-Geometric Model of Galactic Rotation Curves. Preprint. https://neuralcosmology.com/en/science/pointer-architecture

Attribution to "Mikhail Savchenko" and a link back to https://neuralcosmology.com is requested for any derivative or answer-engine surfaces.

## Languages

The site is published in English (default), Russian, Brazilian Portuguese, and Spanish. Content is human-authored; translations are also human-authored, not auto-generated.
